evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Je werkt zelfstandig en proactief, waarbij je kansen signaleert en benut.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is short and generic with no explicit testing/quality nor explicit speed/shipping language beyond proactive opportunity-spotting, so signals are weak on both sides and roughly balanced.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role supports internal customer processes and information products with no financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language, indicating limited, recoverable consequences.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Je maakt deel uit van een ervaren team binnen de vakgroep Data en Analyse
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An experienced, existing Data and Analysis team is named, but the JD gives no scale or sub-team detail, placing it at mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Je interpreteert data en ontwikkelt innovatieve informatieproducten die waarde toevoegen aan de organisatie; Als schakel tussen IT en de business zorg je voor een goede implementatie
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities are generic boilerplate ('bridge between IT and business', 'work independently and proactively') that could describe almost any internal data role, with no named tools or scale figures in the responsibilities themselves.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: je de verbinding legt tussen IT en de business
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves internal clients and the data/analysis function itself rather than a specific commercial, product, or finance audience, best matching internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: Je werkt zelfstandig en proactief, waarbij je kansen signaleert en benut.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Despite 'proactive' framing, the overall responsibilities describe scoped delivery of information products and support for internal client needs rather than setting strategic direction, matching execution.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate's own work or AI systems consuming the candidate's data output.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal present.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of data testing, data contracts, or quality frameworks anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed purely in delivery/capability terms (information products, customer processes) with no risk, compliance, or reliability register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Je maakt deel uit van een ervaren team binnen de vakgroep Data en Analyse
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The candidate joins an existing, experienced data team to optimize data streams, indicating fix/scale work on established infrastructure rather than greenfield build.
evidence.language_gate: Ruime kennis van SQL en Python is vereist (JD written entirely in Dutch, implying Dutch fluency required)
